---
title: "Edward Francis Johns"
---

## Edward Francis Johns

**Dates:** (April 1861-1948)

### Description

second son of the Rev. Charles Alexander Johns

### Biography

He was at Bradfield January 1879-July 1880, then an exhibitioner of Exeter College, Oxford (BA 1884), headmaster of Winton House Prep School 1895.  He  married Violet Marsham in 1910 and had no children. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses, Bradfield College Register</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
